articles.author: Leslie Josephs
articles.title: United Airlines CEO confirms he approached American Airlines about merger - CNBC
articles.description: United CEO Scott Kirby said American rejected the idea, "and without a willing partner, something this big simply can't get done."
articles.content:
United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby confirmed on Monday that he approached American Airlines about a potential merger, a possibility American rejected.
